## Summary

Adds the Phase 0 Authority Registry and a dedicated Phase 0.5B Revise Opportunity Seed contract.

This PR makes the registry the “if in doubt, look here” authority for evaluation and revision work.

## Authority Registry

This PR must comply with:

`docs/phase-0-warmup/PHASE_0_AUTHORITY_REGISTRY.md`

If there is ambiguity about canon, warmup, benchmark authority, WAVE, the 13 Story Criteria, Gate 15, dialogue/speech protection, Story Ledger standards, Revise Queue doctrine, or fail-closed behavior, this registry is the first source of truth.

## Authority-proof requirement

- Do not introduce a second warmup/canon loader.
- Do not hardcode a divergent authority path list.
- Use the Phase 0 Authority Registry or the canonical loader that resolves it.
- Persist `phase0_authority_proof_v1` before Phase 0.5A/0.5B seed generation.
- Record loaded paths, missing paths, and checksums.
- Block or degrade with proof if required authority is unavailable.

## What this adds

- `docs/phase-0-warmup/PHASE_0_AUTHORITY_REGISTRY.md`
- `docs/architecture/phase-0-5b-revise-opportunity-seed.md`

## Doctrine locked

- Phase 0.5A and Phase 0.5B are canon-first and warmup-first.
- Phase 0.5A/0.5B may not generate best-guess seeds from manuscript text alone.
- `phase0_authority_proof_v1` is required before seed generation.
- `story_map_seed_v1` and `revise_opportunity_seed_v1` must record authority proof and loaded authority paths.
- `revise_opportunity_seed_v1` is not author-facing until Revise Admission and candidate validation pass.

## Scope

Documentation/scaffold only.

No runtime behavior changes.
No destructive writes.
No manuscript patch application.
No scoring changes.
No bypass of semantic gates.
No bypass of candidate-prose validation.
No re-enablement of the old nine-layer author approval click-through flow.

## Tests

Docs/scaffold only; no tests run.
